basic_details.job_title: East Coast Railway Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The East Coast Railway (ECoR) has released the official Junior Engineer (C&W) Notification 2026 on 15 May 2026 at https://rrcbbs.org.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the ECoR Junior Engineer (C&W) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 47 years of age with a qualification of Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering (including sub-streams), ITI/Act apprenticeship in the relevant trade, or 10+2 Science can apply offline from 15 May 2026 to 05 June 2026. The official notification PDF and offline application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering branch including their sub stream branches, ITI/Act apprenticeship in the relevant trade, 10+2 Science
qualification.details: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering branch including their sub stream branches OR ITI/Act apprenticeship in the relevant trade OR 10+2 Science.

selection_process: Written Examination (CBT/TBT Mode) Scrutiny of Service Record and last three years APARs Medical Examination (B1) SPE/Vigilance/D&AR clearance
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for East Coast Railway Junior Engineer(C&W) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://rrcbbs.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the East Coast Railway Junior Engineer(C&W) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the East Coast Railway Junior Engineer(C&W) recruitment is 05-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Engineer(C&W) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies available for the Junior Engineer(C&W) post in East Coast Railway.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering branch, or ITI/Act apprenticeship in the relevant trade, or 10+2 Science.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Junior Engineer(C&W) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Engineer(C&W) position is 47 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Junior Engineer(C&W) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Engineer(C&W) post will be as per Level-6 of the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination (CBT/TBT Mode), Scrutiny of Service Record and APARs, Medical Examination, and SPE/Vigilance/D&AR clearance.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for this recruitment in Offline mode.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for East Coast Railway recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for East Coast Railway recruitment is https://rrcbbs.org.in.

faq.question: Q10. Where should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: The completed application form should be sent to the address mentioned in the official notification through Speed Post/Registered Post.
